key_skills: C#, Rest, Commercial, Software Development, Microsoft Azure, Engineering, React Native, Tracking, SQL Server, Azure Cloud, Microservices, Application Development, SQL, Cloud, Angular, React.js, Cloud Applications, .NET Core, Web Technologies, Writing, .NET, TypeScript, Communication Skills
job_description:
Job Description
Description:
we are looking for :
Someone who can do system designs
Someone who has some drive. We don't want to have to tell them what to do all the time.
Fully versed in tracking and controlling software relating to changes to your source code.
Proven history across the Microsoft stack and cloud related technologies.
Experience in delivering end-to-end outcomes based and able to articulate these into meaningful business outcomes.
Other custom SaaS / multitenant / enterprise type software
Requirements:
A senior/lead developer with 8-15 years of experience across both web and application development with a focus on the below technologies and frameworks.
- .NET Core, C#, EF, SQL
- Azure
- Microservices
- Angular, TypeScript OR React.js
Job Responsibilities:
At least 8-15 years experience developing commercial and cloud applications
Proven ability to lead the resolution of technical problems with an ability to breakdown large requirements into manageable pieces of work
A keen desire working in a collaborative Agile engineering team, sharing your knowledge, experience and providing technical assistance to the rest of the team
In depth knowledge of developing software using technologies such as .NET, C#, SQL Server
Experience in designing and implementing REST API using .NET WebAPIs
Solid knowledge and experience of OO principles, software development and engineering best practices
An inquisitive mind with an excellent attention to quality and detail
Excellent written and verbal communication skills to both technical and non-technical audiences
Desire to learn new technologies such as React.js, React Native, Azure Cloud
What We Offer:
Exciting Projects: We focus on industries like High-Tech, communication, media, healthcare, retail and telecom. Our customer list is full of fantastic global brands and leaders who love what we build for them.
Collaborative Environment: You Can expand your skills by collaborating with a diverse team of highly talented people in an open, laidback environment — or even abroad in one of our global centers or client facilities!
Work-Life Balance: GlobalLogic prioritizes work-life balance, which is why we offer flexible work schedules, opportunities to work from home, and paid time off and holidays.
Professional Development: Our dedicated Learning & Development team regularly organizes Communication skills training(GL Vantage, Toast Master),Stress Management program, professional certifications, and technical and soft skill trainings.
Excellent Benefits: We provide our employees with competitive salaries, family medical insurance, Group Term Life Insurance, Group Personal Accident Insurance , NPS(National Pension Scheme ), Periodic health awareness program, extended maternity leave, annual performance bonuses, and referral bonuses.
Fun Perks: We want you to love where you work, which is why we host sports events, cultural activities, offer food on subsidies rates, Corporate parties. Our vibrant offices also include dedicated GL Zones, rooftop decks and GL Club where you can drink coffee or tea with your colleagues over a game of table and offer discounts for popular stores and restaurants!
View more
Quick apply
Applied

title: AWS - Devops Engineer
skills: AWS DevOps, Terraform, AWS Infrastructure, AWS Lambda Function, IAM, Ansible, Docker, Github, Kubernetes, CI CD Pipeline
key_skills: AWS DevOps, Terraform, AWS Infrastructure, AWS Lambda Function, IAM, Ansible, Docker, Github, Kubernetes, CI CD Pipeline
job_description:
Job Description
Job Title: DevOps Engineer AWS & CI/CD
Job Summary
We are looking for a skilled DevOps Engineer with strong expertise in AWS infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines. The role focuses on building, packaging, and deploying a document service using modern DevOps practices and cloud-native technologies.
Key Responsibilities
Design, develop, and maintain scalable AWS infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (IaC).
Build and manage CI/CD pipelines for automated build, test, and deployment processes.
Create and maintain modular Terraform code across multiple environments (Dev, SIT, Pre-Prod, Prod).
Develop and manage Docker images, including Lambda Layer image creation with required system libraries and fonts.
Package and deploy AWS Lambda functions using optimized layer archives.
Implement and enforce least-privilege IAM policies for secure cloud environments.
Manage GitLab CI/CD pipelines, including multi-stage pipelines and ephemeral per-branch environment setup.
Core Skills (Mandatory)
Strong experience in Terraform (modular architecture, multi-environment deployments)
Hands-on experience with Docker (containerization and image building)
Expertise in AWS Lambda packaging and deployment
Proficiency in GitLab CI/CD pipeline development
Strong knowledge of AWS IAM (policy creation and security best practices)
Supporting Skills (Good to Have)
AWS API Gateway REST APIs and Lambda proxy integration
AWS Cognito user pools and Lambda triggers (pre-token generation)
AWS EventBridge scheduling and event-driven architecture
AWS KMS encryption key management across services
Terraform State Management remote backends, locking, environment isolation
Experience with tflint, tfsec, or similar tools for infrastructure validation and security scanning
Preferred Experience
Experience in cloud-native application deployment and microservices architecture
Strong understanding of DevOps best practices, automation, and monitoring
Exposure to secure, scalable, and high-availability system design
View more
Compensation
CTC range₹15L - ₹30L/year
Quick apply
Applied

title: Lead Information Security Engineer
skills: Security Compliance, Continuous Integration, Kubernetes, Ci/Cd, Tools, Docker, Ansible, Cloud, Scripting, Coding, GraphQL, Scripting Languages, Progra
key_skills: Security Compliance, Continuous Integration, Kubernetes, Ci/Cd, Tools, Docker, Ansible, Cloud, Scripting, Coding, GraphQL, Scripting Languages, Programming, CD, Python, Github, Cloud Security, Microsoft Azure, Amazon Ec2, As, Framework, Lambda Expressions, Management, Infrastructure, Terraform, AWS
job_description:
Job Description
Additional Information
Qualifications
At least 8 Years of practical experience in developing customized rules for Cloud Security Posture Management.
Proven experience with Wiz.
Strong proficiency in scripting languages including Python and PowerShell.
Proficiency with GitHub and CI/CD processes.
Strong understanding of security compliance frameworks and cloud security services.
Responsibilities
What Makes This Opportunity Unique
At Principal Financial Group, we prioritize creating an extraordinary environment where our employees can excel. As a Lead Information Security Engineer based in HYDERABAD, you'll be a key figure in cloud security, ensuring smooth performance and high-reaching expansion. You'll become part of our “Network Vulnerability Management & Configuration Management” Team, charged with writing custom CSPM misconfiguration rules and providing support/ guidance to our stakeholders in addressing misconfigurations/CSPM within our public cloud infrastructure. This is your opportunity to give significantly to the security foundation of our worldwide operations!
Cloud Security Posture Management
Must have Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) - Use tools to discover assets in cloud infrastructure to identify and continuously monitor for security vulnerabilities and misconfigurations
Must have Experience in scripting languages such as Python (required), PowerShell etc.
Must have Programming/Scripting competency with Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) using Terraform (Preferred) or Ansible
Must have hands-on experience on using Rego Policy and/ or GraphQL
Must have Proficiency with GitHub, as well as Continuous Integration/ Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) processes.
Collaborate with developers across the organization to manage Cloud Security Posture Management to reduce threats.
Hands-on experience with CSPM tools like Wiz (preferred) or Prisma Cloud (good to have) and the ability to create custom rules as per business requirements.
Understanding of native cloud solutions like EC2’s, Containers, Lambda’s, Docker, containers, Kubernetes, VDIs, cloud storage, cloud infrastructure, etc. And other cloud security services like Load Balancer, VPC Flow Logs, EKS, Lambda, and WAFs.
Good to have hands on experience on SSPM (SaaS Security Posture Management) tools
Hands-on experience in AWS (preferred) and Azure (good to have)
Candidate should have AWS Cloud Practioner certification (CCP). AWS Cloud Security Specialty certification is a plus.
Qualifications
Required Skills & Experience
Strong hands-on experience with Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM).
Proficiency in Python (required); experience in PowerShell is a plus.
Experience with Terraform (preferred) or Ansible
Practical experience creating rules using Rego and/or working with GraphQL.
Strong knowledge of GitHub and CI/CD processes.
Hands-on expertise with CSPM tools such as Wiz (preferred) or Prisma Cloud (good to have).
Solid understanding of cloud-native services (AWS preferred; Azure good to have).
View more
Quick apply

title: Senior Technical Release Manager
skills: AWS, EKS, TypeScript, Node.js, PHP, MySQL, Postgresql, Kafka, Docker, Kubernetes, DevOps
key_skills: AWS, EKS, TypeScript, Node.js, PHP, MySQL, Postgresql, Kafka, Docker, Kubernetes, DevOps
job_description:
Job Description
About Sureify:
Sureify is dedicated to modernizing the life insurance and annuity industry. We provide cutting-edge digital solutions that empower insurers to easily engage with, sell to, and service their customers. Our mission is to drive meaningful digital transformation by offering scalable technology that enhances customer engagement and streamlines carrier operations. Sureify's products deliver the advanced digital experiences that life insurance carriers, agents, employees, and consumers now expect in this rapidly evolving technological landscape. At Sureify, we cultivate a culture that prioritizes innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.
Role Overview:
We are looking for a Senior Technical Release Manager to join our Hyderabad office. This role will be responsible for managing all production releases across our enterprise platform and customer-specific solutions. Unlike traditional release roles, this position serves as a Technical Release Governor in a complex hybrid environment consisting of both multi-tenant products and multi-instance siloed environments.As we scale our carrier customer base, we are looking to adopt best of the breed release practices. You will be the single point of accountability for replacing high-intensity manual interventions in releases with a systematic, technically rigorous process. You will ensure releases are delivered with quality, predictability, and efficiency while bridging the gap between engineering, QA, product, and client support teams.
Key Responsibilities:
Release Lifecycle Leadership: Own and manage the end-to-end release lifecycle for all production deployments, including core platform production updates and customer-specific customizations. Define, document, and enforce release management processes and standards. Create and maintain the release calendar, ensuring transparency and alignment across teams.
Technical Gatekeeping: Conduct deep-dive release readiness reviews. You will audit "Release Manifests" by validating steps such as SQL migrations or PDF template migrations, Temporal workflow versioning, Kafka schemas, and AWS resource configurations.
A good overall understanding of deployment architecture in AWS is essential for this role.
Environment Governance: Manage "Instance Parity" across our AWS multi-instance architecture to prevent "Environmental Drift" and ensure customer-specific secrets and variables match our global standards.
Cross-Functional Orchestration: Facilitate formal "Go/No-Go" decisions by tracking a global checklist that includes technical and non-technical readiness.
Risk Mitigation: Identify, document, and mitigate technical sequencing risks (e.g., database locks or stateful workflow conflicts) associated with production releases.Continuous Improvement: Monitor release performance, generate and provide metrics and reports and drive the transition from manual coordination to Automated Production Quality Gates within our release pipelines.
Required Qualifications & Experience:
10+ years of overall technical experience, with a background in software engineering, SRE, or backend operations.
5+ years of direct release management experience in a complex, enterprise hybrid SaaS environment (Multi-tenant & Multi-instance).C
loud-Native Expertise: Expert-level knowledge of AWS (EKS, RDS, Secrets Manager, IAM, S3, MSK) and the ability to audit infrastructure-level configurations.
Stack Fluency: Demonstrated familiarity with Typescript, PHP, Go-lang, and Node.js ecosystems. You must understand the deployment nuances of each.
Modern Orchestration: Hands-on experience or strong knowledge of Temporal (stateful workflows) and Kafka (event streaming). You understand the risks of deploying to "in-flight" asynchronous processes.
Database Proficiency: Strong proficiency in MySQL and Postgres, specifically in auditing complex migration scripts and data sequencing.
Containerization Mastery: Deep understanding of Kubernetes (K8s) manifest auditing and deployment patterns (Canary, Blue-Green, or Rolling Updates).
Communication & Gravitas: Excellent stakeholder management skills with the professional authority to enforce discipline and halt releases if technical or business criteria are not met.
Preferred / Nice-to-Have Skills:
Experience in the insurance or financial services domain (or other regulated industries).Knowledge of security, compliance (SOC2/ISO), or audit processes as they relate to release operations.Experience with Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools like Terraform or CloudFormation.Familiarity with Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) principles such as Error Budgets and SLIs/SLOs.
Why Join Sureify?At Sureify, youll be part of a collaborative, innovation-driven culture where your expertise will directly influence the quality and success of products, transforming the life insurance landscape. Youll work alongside passionate technologists and industry experts, tackling complex challenges with cutting-edge technologies while helping shape the future of digital insurance.
Our Guiding PrinciplesOur products are for nothing if their creators are not fulfilled in their work. We want our employees to flourish at Sureify. We do not fawn over status or titles; instead, we honour effort and intelligence. The best idea wins, no matter which colleague proposed it. We do not shortcut our mission with overblown claims or false promises. Sticking to the truth is both a strategy and a principle for us. Sureify is an Equal Opportunity Employer committed to diversity. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, national origin, citizenship, ancestry, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender perception or identity, age, disability, veteran or military status, or any other basis prohibited by law.
View more
Quick apply
Applied
